task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo CRM application is open, displaying the pipeline in Kanban or List view.
The search bar shows a filter for 'Azure Interior' or the agent is visibly viewing the opportunities associated with this customer.

task_completion.description: Mark 'Office Expansion Project' with the Red color
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity card or list entry for 'Office Expansion Project' has a Red color stripe/tag applied to it.

task_completion.description: Mark 'Conference Room Redesign' with the Red color
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity card or list entry for 'Conference Room Redesign' has a Red color stripe/tag applied to it.

task_completion.description: Mark 'Executive Suite Update' with the Red color
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity card or list entry for 'Executive Suite Update' has a Red color stripe/tag applied to it.

task_completion.description: Mark 'Break Room Outfitting' with the Red color
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity card or list entry for 'Break Room Outfitting' has a Red color stripe/tag applied to it.

task_completion.description: Do not modify opportunities for other customers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Opportunities belonging to customers other than 'Azure Interior' remain in their default uncolored state and do not have the Red color applied.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface (e.g., clicking Kanban dropdowns, color pickers) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Color changes are applied using standard Odoo UI elements
integrity.visual_evidence: The Red color appears as the standard Odoo UI element (e.g., the left-side color stripe on Kanban cards) rather than text edits or injected HTML.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI using direct database or API access
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal window open showing direct database queries (psql) or Python XML-RPC scripts being executed to modify the records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target partner: 'Azure Interior'. The 4 seeded opportunities for this account are: 'Office Expansion Project', 'Conference Room Redesign', 'Executive Suite Update', and 'Break Room Outfitting'. The target color is Red (Odoo color index 1). All other opportunities must remain uncolored.
